homepage.title: DST-CHEMICALS I Energy-saving a cost-cutting cleaning solutions
homepage.description: Improve operations and cut costs with our water-based industrial cleaning solutions that ensure high cleanliness at low temperatures.
homepage.text_excerpt:
DST-CHEMICALS I Energy-saving a cost-cutting cleaning solutions
Skip to main content
Industrial cleaning is a question of chemistry
We at
DST-CHEMICALS
help people all over the world streamline industrial parts cleaning processes. Obviously, the chemicals in your cleaners are crucial. But there is more. There needs to be chemistry. A spark of we’re in it together. Our specialists are ready to help find your next energy-saving and cost-cutting cleaning solution. Are you?
Clean up with cost-cutting products
3 reasons customers can’t get enough of our cleaners
High performance at
low temperatures
Our cleaners are foam-free from 38°C. This allows you to cut operating costs and streamline your parts cleaning processes.
Makes your
workday easier
The pH of our water-based cleaning products varies from slightly acidic to neutral and slightly alkaline. As a result, parts cleaning is possible – without risking the health of employees.
Improves
bath life
Our water-based, demulsifying cleaning products allow you to increase production time thanks to the longer bath life. Without compromising on cleanliness, obviously.
Parts cleaning at low temperatures has never been hotter.
Explore how you can save money
See how we help others
Toyota Material Handling Sweden
Low temperature industrial cleaning saves Toyota 40% energy
Read more
HUMAN ACTIVE TECHNOLOGY (HAT)
Cleaning before powder coating. Done right.
Read more
Pure Performance in industrial parts cleaning
No cleaner fits all. That is why we develop cleaning solutions to meet specific operational needs. The first step is to understand your cleaning processes. What do you need? And what is challenging you? When we know, we move on to the next steps of the process. Yes, there is a process. It’s called Pure Performance, and it delivers as promised.
Assessing the requirements
Step 1/6
We visit your production facilities to understand your industrial cleaning processes. To help you find the optimum solution, we take samples of the oil or emulsion back home to our tech lab and, if possible, also the parts to be cleaned are taken.
Tests & analysis
Step 2/6
Now it’s time to find the best industrial cleaning solution to meet your needs. To do so, our specialists test a wide range of water-based industrial cleaners with focus on their ability to demulsify in relation to your current application and equipment available.
Development (R&D)
Step 3/6
Your problem is our pain. If we don’t have the cleaner to fit your needs, we will develop it. Sounds simple. However, it is not. Fortunately, our experienced chemists love innovating water-based cleaning products and they will develop the precise formulation for your operation.
Implementation
Step 4/6
After finding your optimum water-based industrial cleaning product, it is time to put it into action. One of our experienced technicians are with you every step of the way to make sure the conversion to the new product runs smoothly. They will also help adjust the machine to ensur

about.text:
Get to know us - DST-CHEMICALS
Skip to main content
Get to know us
It’s a question of chemistry
Enable audio
Less maintenance. Less use of water. Less energy consumption. Less hassle.
More productivity, cost reductions and smiley faces.
No matter if you are working in procurement or in production, you need a partner who really wants to help you. A partner who is eager to clean up your greasy challenges with water-based cleaning solutions.
That’s what we’ve done since 1987. We have manufactured and supplied chemicals for cleaning, degreasing, passivation and  derusting across a wide range of industries.
There is more. We are more.
We are DST
.  When you work with us, you’ll know that people like doing business with us because we’re genuine, friendly and skilled people.
No solution fits all. That is why we need to understand your production processes before we can clean things up. What do you need? And what is
challenging you? When we get the bigger picture, our brightest minds put the smaller pieces together. We develop, assess, test, implement and maintain your water-based cleaning solution – with local service teams around the world.
When partnering with us, you get a water-based cleaning solution that will wipe out grease, corrosion, and bad-for-business processes. You get a solution delivers fast, reliable results even at low temperatures, helping reduce cleaning costs, improve operations, and maintain a spotless production environment
The highlights
DST-KEMI was founded in Kolding, Denmark.
DST-DEGREEZ launched.
Obtained environment-friendly product certification.
Established DST-KEMI GmbH, Germany.
Moved to our current location. New and larger HQ offices and production.
Established DST-CHEMICALS India Pvt. Ltd.
Established operations in CEE.
DST-DERUST launched.
Acquired DST-CHEMICALS SARL in France.
Rebranding of the entire group to DST-CHEMICALS.
DST-PAS and DST-DEBURR launched.
Established DST-CHEMICALS AB, Sweden.
Initial ISO 9001 and 14001 certifications.
Established DST-CHEMICALS Inc in the US.
Established warehouse in Shanghai.
DST-FLOOR CLEANER launched.
DST-PINK GEL launched.
DST-OFFSHORE CLEANER launched.
Majority sold to Foreman Capital.
HOCNF approval obtained for the DST-OFFSHORE CLEANER
CEFAS approval obtained for the DST-OFFSHORE CLEANER.
Established operations in Norway for the energy, oil&gas, and marine industry.
DST-GEL brand and product portfolio launched.
Acquired Eco-Point Group in the Netherlands.
We stand together
– in reaching your goals
We usually say that we were already working towards fulfilling the UN sustainability goal about responsible production before it even existed.
Back in the early 1980s our founder, Peer Funk, was selling hazardous chemicals. Peer was up-set about the negative impact of these chemicals on the work environment. Not to mention the careless disposal of waste-water. That is how it all started. In the spare room on the pool table mixing water-based, non-hazardous chemicals.
Peer was convinced this was the way ahead. Our CEO, Jacob Funk still recalls how he helped his father finding the right mixture in order to obtain the highest level of cleanliness and at the same time reduce the environmental impact and help create a safer work environment.
To this day, this is still how we formulate new products. Admittedly, there are things we can’t clean. We won’t even try, because it goes against our philosophy, which started out in that spare room. Long before the UN developed the Sustainable Development Goals as we know them today.
Commitment
internally
Sustainable production
Equality for our employees
Reduction of our environmental
impact
Commitment to
our customers
Sustainable production
Reduced carbon footprint
Lower energy consumption
Improved work environment
Use water-based chemicals today
Can you feel it, too?
On the spotless surface achieving Pure Performance might seem easy. It is not. It is a question of chemistry.
So, if you, like us, believe in the power of working w

products.text:
See all our cleaning and degreasing products - DST-CHEMICALS
Skip to main content
We need to understand your processes
before we can clean things up
No cleaner-fits-all. That is why we need to understand your cleaning processes. What do you need? And what is challenging you? When we know, we move on to the next steps of the process in finding the perfect
industrial cleaner and degreaser
cleaning solution to fit your needs.
Eco-friendly degreaser
Eco-friendly degreasing and cleaning products for any metal and any purpose. The product portfolio consists of more than 40 products and we will help you choose the one that works for you.
Cleaning after deburring
Choose a water-based cleaner for removal of the oxide layer after thermal deburring or electrochemical machining. No more shattered or cracked parts. No more dillution or neutralisation.
Rust removal solution
Non-hazardous, water-based rust remover. That efficiently removes that serious rust and oxide layer. At room temperature that is. Do you also want quick and pure results in a safe work environment?
Rust prevention
High humidity and storage normally don’t go well with metal. Unless, of course you take our rust inhibitor, protection and passivation into account.
High viscocity cleaner
High viscocity cleaner that is ready to use. For those complicated components with tricky spots or the oversized parts that don’t fit in a washer.
Spray on – leave for 2-10 mins – rinse off.
Industrial floor cleaner
Water-based, non-harzardous cleaning of floors in workshops and production units. Put that slippery floors behind you with odour free, biodegradable floor cleaner liquid.
Offshore cleaner
The product was developed in close collaboration with a
multinational corporation. The specific task was to create a safer work environment when cleaning the offshore installations.
Whether you need an industrial cleaner and degreaser for heavy machinery, industrial equipment, or even specific materials, we are dedicated to finding the right solution for you. So, if you are looking for a cleaning solution that is tailored to your specific needs, reach out to us today and let us help you find the perfect fit for your business.
Can you feel it, too?
On the spotless surface achieving Pure Performance might seem easy. It is not. It is a question of chemistry.
So, if you, like us, believe in the power of working with dedicated specialists, we are ready to help. Let’s reduce cost and improve your environmental footprint with a new industrial cleaning solution.
